summary: Added isPlaceholderWallet() validator that rejects 0x0, zero address, empty, and null wallet values. createAgentIdentity() now throws on placeholder wallets. Both NewAgent and CeoAgentCreation flows guard identity creation with real wallet validation. AgentIdentitySection displays registration status, operator wallet, and full manifest JSON. 15 new tests plus 1 existing test updated.

codeQuality.structure: isPlaceholderWallet is clean, well-tested, and reusable. Identity creation correctly builds manifest via buildManifest() and inserts with proper error handling.
codeQuality.security: Placeholder wallet rejection prevents accidental identity creation with zero/null addresses. Wallet validation occurs before any Supabase write.
codeQuality.testCoverage: 14 new tests covering wallet validation (6 cases), createAgentIdentity rejection (3 cases), and AgentIdentitySection rendering states (5 cases: loading, empty, pending, registered, manifest).
codeQuality.patterns: Follows existing pattern of throwing errors with descriptive messages. Uses existing Supabase client consistently.
